header.name: JAKKI CHAITANYA ESWAR RAJESH
header.title: AI Engineer  |  Azure Data Engineer  |  Python Developer
header.links: LinkedIn  |  GitHub: github.com/ChaitanyaEswarRajeshJakki  |  AppNova AI  |  AriesGPT

summary: Microsoft Certified Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203) with 4 years 9 months of hands-on IT experience building production Generative AI systems, voice AI pipelines, and cloud-scale ETL pipelines. Currently leading development of AppNova AI — an enterprise-grade, full-stack multi-agent LLM platform with FastAPI, React/TypeScript, LangGraph, ChromaDB RAG, and 5 LLM providers (Claude, Gemini, Groq, Ollama). Also built AriesGPT — a 5-microservice AI platform including a production VoiceBot (Whisper STT + Groq LLaMA 3 + gTTS TTS) with async FastAPI endpoints and structured JSON outputs. Proven track record architecting 30+ Azure Data Factory ETL pipelines for U.S. government agencies, reducing data processing time by 50%. Available for remote or Hyderabad-based AI Engineer and Azure Data Engineer roles.

skills.AI & LLMs: LangChain, LangGraph, Multi-Agent Orchestration, RAG, Prompt Engineering (CoT, ReAct, Few-Shot), Claude, Gemini, Groq (LLaMA 3), Ollama, Whisper (STT), gTTS (TTS), Edge TTS, Voice Pipeline Design, ViT-GPT2, Hugging Face Transformers, Sentence Transformers
skills.Vector Databases: ChromaDB, Semantic Search, Embedding Pipelines, Corpus Deduplication, Content Fingerprinting
skills.Cloud & Azure: Azure Data Factory (ADF), Azure Data Lake Gen2, Azure SQL Database, Azure Key Vault, Azure VMs, Azure Elastic Pools, Azure Logic Apps, Azure Storage
skills.Programming: Python (Advanced), FastAPI, Flask, asyncio, Pydantic, SQL, Bash, REST APIs, Structured JSON Outputs, Confidence Thresholds, Escalation Logic
skills.Data Engineering: ETL Pipeline Design, ADF Mapping Data Flows, Cloud Migration (On-Prem → Azure), Data Warehousing, Data Validation & Transformation, Data Modeling
skills.AI/ML Libraries: OpenCV, FFmpeg, MoviePy, Pillow, scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, PyTorch (inference), python-docx, PyMuPDF, gTTS, GFPGAN, DeblurGANv2
skills.DevOps & Tools: GitHub Actions (CI/CD), Docker (basic), SSE Streaming, Loguru, Git, React (TypeScript/Vite), Angular (frontend integration), Uvicorn

experience.title: AI Engineer & Azure Data Engineer
experience.company: West Advanced Technologies India Pvt. Ltd.

sections.heading: AI & GenAI Application Development
bullets: Built AppNova AI — an enterprise full-stack multi-agent platform using FastAPI (backend) + React/TypeScript/Vite (frontend), with 12 specialized LangGraph agents (architecture, code-analysis, code-generation, business-rules, security, DevOps, documentation, testing, data-migration, UI/UX, integration, migration-planner) that analyse legacy codebases and generate structured modernisation reports as DOCX/PDF exports.

Implemented a 5-provider LLM cascade (Claude Sonnet, Gemini Flash, Groq LLaMA 3, Ollama) with per-key round-robin rotation across 25+ API keys, rate-limit detection, automatic provider fallback, and content-fingerprint caching — achieving near-zero idle time across all concurrent agents.

Designed ChromaDB-backed RAG pipeline with corpus deduplication, AST-based file summaries, and semantic search — allowing agents to retrieve code-relevant context in under 200ms regardless of project size.

Built AriesGPT — an Angular + FastAPI AI monorepo with 5 independent microservices: VoiceBot (Whisper STT + Groq LLaMA 3 + gTTS TTS), Video to Narrative (OpenCV + ViT-GPT2 + Whisper + Groq), Facial Deblur (GFPGAN), Vehicle Deblur (DeblurGANv2), and Aries GPT conversational assistant — all integrated into a single Angular dashboard.

VoiceBot pipeline: browser audio input → Whisper speech-to-text transcription → Groq LLaMA 3 intent understanding and response generation with structured JSON outputs → gTTS text-to-speech synthesis returned to frontend; built with async FastAPI endpoints, strict request/response schemas, and escalation logic for failed transcription or LLM timeouts.

Deployed GovGenie — a RAG-powered RFP response generator (Ollama + LangChain + ChromaDB) that retrieves past proposal language semantically and auto-populates government RFP templates, reducing bid writing time by ~70%.

Built Reference Filler — a FastAPI + ChromaDB document automation system that parses uploaded resumes with LLM, extracts structured data, and fills DOCX templates — replacing a manual 45-minute HR task with a 2-minute automated workflow.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions for zero-downtime automated deployment of all AI applications.

sections.heading: Azure Data Factory & ETL Pipeline Engineering
bullets: Architected 30+ production ADF pipelines for U.S. government clients (Contra Costa County, California State Agencies, LA County) ingesting high-volume RMS records into Azure SQL Database and Data Lake with zero data loss.
Designed end-to-end ETL workflows using Mapping Data Flows, Lookup activities, and parameterized Linked Services — achieving 50% faster data processing versus the prior manual batch process.
Automated validation, deduplication, and transformation logic in ADF, cutting manual data review effort by 40% and providing real-time pipeline health visibility via Azure Monitor alerts.

Led ARIES cloud migration — moved a large-scale criminal justice system (40+ tables, multi-million row datasets) from on-premises SQL Server to Azure Cloud with zero data loss and a full lineage audit trail.
Maintained Linked Services, Integration Runtimes, and self-hosted IR configurations across Azure SQL, SFTP, REST, and Blob sources with secure credential management via Azure Key Vault.

Earned Microsoft Azure Data Engineer Associate (DP-203) certification — foundation for joining WATI in August 2021.

projects.name: VoiceBot
projects.subtitle: End-to-End Voice Assistant Microservice
projects.stack: FastAPI · Whisper · Groq LLaMA 3 · gTTS · Angular
bullets: Built production voice assistant as part of AriesGPT monorepo: speech captured via browser → Whisper STT transcription → Groq LLaMA 3 response generation with structured JSON output → gTTS voice synthesis returned to Angular frontend.

Implemented async FastAPI endpoints with strict request/response schemas, confidence threshold logic, and escalation handling for failed transcription or LLM timeouts — designed for production reliability.
Pipeline built for extensibility: fallback responses, error state management, and per-request logging via rotating file handlers.

projects.name: AppNova AI
projects.subtitle: Enterprise Multi-Agent Code Modernisation Platform
projects.stack: FastAPI · React/TypeScript/Vite · LangGraph · Claude · Gemini · Groq · ChromaDB · asyncio · SSE
bullets: Production-grade full-stack AI platform (200+ files) where 12 specialized LangGraph agents run in parallel to analyse legacy codebases and produce structured modernisation reports exported as DOCX and PDF.
Engineered 5-provider LLM cascade with automatic key rotation across 25+ API keys — agents never stall on rate-limits.
SHA-256 content-fingerprint caching lets repeated uploads skip all LLM calls entirely, serving ChromaDB results in seconds.
SSE streaming with fan-out queue architecture, real-time agent thinking logs, per-agent cancellation, and Spectator Mode.

projects.name: AriesGPT
projects.subtitle: Angular + FastAPI AI Monorepo
projects.stack: Angular · FastAPI · GFPGAN · DeblurGANv2 · Whisper · ViT-GPT2 · Groq
bullets: Unified Angular + FastAPI workspace with 5 independent AI microservices: VoiceBot, Video to Narrative, Aries GPT assistant, GFPGAN facial deblur, and DeblurGANv2 vehicle deblur.
Each service runs independently with its own venv and requirements; CORS handled via environment-based origin configuration.

projects.name: Video to Narrative
projects.subtitle: Surveillance Video Summarisation App
bullets: Flask AI app: extracts frames with OpenCV at configurable intervals, generates per-frame captions via ViT-GPT2, transcribes audio with Whisper, then uses Groq LLaMA 3 to produce both plain-English and formal law-enforcement incident summaries as structured JSON.
GPU/CPU auto-detection via PyTorch; automatic cleanup of frames and uploaded video post-processing.

projects.name: GovGenie
projects.subtitle: AI-Powered RFP Response Generator
projects.stack: FastAPI · Ollama (LLaMA 3.1) · LangChain · ChromaDB · Hugging Face
bullets: RAG system that reads an uploaded government RFP PDF, retrieves semantically similar past proposal sections from ChromaDB, and drafts section-by-section responses — reducing RFP writing effort by ~70%.
ConversationBufferMemory for follow-up clause questions; per-stage token metrics via tiktoken for cost visibility.

bullets: HR uploads resume + template → LLM extracts structured candidate data → fills DOCX via semantic field mapping — turning 45-minute manual task into 2-minute automated workflow.

projects.name: Gemini YouTube Automation Bot
projects.subtitle: Autonomous AI Video Publisher
projects.stack: Python · Gemini · MoviePy · gTTS · GitHub Actions · YouTube Data API
bullets: Fully autonomous pipeline: Gemini generates SEO-optimised scripts → gTTS voiceover → MoviePy video composition → YouTube Data API auto-publish — entire workflow runs on GitHub Actions cron, no server required.

projects.name: AI Content Bot
projects.subtitle: Fully Automated Daily AI/Tech Video Pipeline
projects.stack: Python · Gemini 2.5 Flash · Microsoft Edge TTS · MoviePy · FFmpeg · Pexels API · Cloudinary · YouTube Data API · Instagram Graph API · GitHub Actions
bullets: Fully automated daily pipeline: fetches trending AI & Tech news from RSS feeds (TechCrunch, VentureBeat, The Hacker News, AI News) → Gemini 2.5 Flash generates a 45-second script, Instagram caption, 20 hashtags, and a topic-matched Pexels search keyword → Microsoft Edge TTS generates voiceover with word-level timing for animated captions → MoviePy + FFmpeg assembles 3 Pexels stock clips into a 1080×1920 vertical video with animated word-synced captions and title overlay.
Publishes automatically to YouTube Shorts (YouTube Data API v3) and Instagram Reels (Cloudinary CDN + Instagram Graph API) — 100% hands-free via GitHub Actions daily cron at 6:00 AM IST.

Built a Gemini 2.5 Flash auto-fix agent: on pipeline failure, downloads the job log, analyses it alongside all source files, and opens a pull request with patched code automatically — no manual intervention required.
